creator: aguzman@pendulosoftware.com.ve
text: Based in Caracas, Venezuela, Pendulo Software provides and specializes in support and consulting for FreeBSD and Linux solutions. We offer onsite as well as offsite support,web development, design (2D and 3D), Multimedia, VPNs implementation, Virtualization,VoIP, high performance servers, Firewalls, custom application programming and many others services. Our experience covers the most important branches of current IT industry, from routine of server management, security audits and updates, to high performance computing and mitigating attacks. For more information about our services, please visit our multilanguage website, you can send an email to atencioncliente@pendulosoftware.com.ve or infocorp@pendulosoftware.com.ve or call us under +58 (212) 637-1074, +1 (407) 536-9895, or +1 (253) 642-6484.
